About Calvin Power Washing

Calvin Power Washing started with a simple goal: to provide Portland homeowners with reliable and effective exterior cleaning solutions. We're not just another pressure washing company; we're your neighbors, committed to preserving the beauty and integrity of our community's homes.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our pressure washing services.

What is soft washing?

Soft washing uses low pressure and specialized detergents to gently clean surfaces without causing damage. It's ideal for delicate siding materials like wood and stucco.

How often should I have my house washed?

We recommend having your house washed every 1-2 years to prevent the buildup of harmful growths and maintain its appearance.

Is your cleaning solution safe for plants and pets?

Yes, we use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions that are safe for plants, pets, and your family.

Reviews From Our Pressure Washing Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Calvin Power Washing did an amazing job on our house! Our siding was covered in moss and algae, and now it looks brand new. The team was professional, efficient, and very careful with our landscaping. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. House Washing

"Our driveway was a mess with oil stains and dirt. Calvin Power Washing came out and completely transformed it. It looks so much better now! I only gave 4 stars because there was a slight delay in scheduling, but the work itself was excellent."

David K. Driveway Cleaning

"We had a lot of moss growing on our roof, and we were worried about damage. Calvin Power Washing cleaned it all off without any issues. They were very professional and explained the whole process to us. Great service!"

Emily L. Roof Cleaning
